rationale: Top-of-form field for the foreign corporation's registered name. Foreign-entity-name convention (entity-name-vs-home-jurisdiction); same key as MLLC-12 / MLPA-12B / MLLP-12B.

label_verbatim: FIRST: The state or country under the laws of which it is incorporated is
rationale: State or country of incorporation. Same key as MLPA-12B / MLLP-12B.

label_verbatim: and the address of its principal office is located at: ___
rationale: First (inline) line of the principal-office address. Same key as MLPA-12B / MLLP-12B.

label_verbatim: [continuation of principal office address] (street, city, state and zip code)
rationale: Second (overflow) line for the same principal-office address; the form provides two visual lines under the single '(street, city, state and zip code)' caption. Mapped to the same canonical key as Text3 — the filler will write the same string to both widgets, or synth may produce a value that fits Text4 alone. See open_question on dual-line address widgets.

label_verbatim: SECOND: The date of its incorporation is
rationale: Date of original incorporation in the home jurisdiction. Same key as MLLP-12 / MLPA-12B.

label_verbatim: By [signature of any duly authorized officer] / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined name and capacity of the authorized officer (Shape D — single combined widget). Form footnote requires §1217.5 authorization.
